# ProjectContext

Bidirectional project-context doc projection between Lithos and Obsidian.

**Tier:** Foundation

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |

| `lithos_loom.render_project_context` | S | 0 | 3 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.render_project_context`
- def `render_doc` ‚Äî Render a :class:`Note` into a Markdown string with YAML frontmatter.
- def `extract_frontmatter` ‚Äî Split a rendered Markdown file into ``(frontmatter_dict, body_with_title)``.
- def `compute_body_hash` ‚Äî SHA-256 of the body half (frontmatter excluded).
